title: pararuellia alata
intro: Pararuellia alata, also known as Pararuellia, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and to support immune function.
